title: Cold Steel
description: Simple vanilla-themed resource pack that converts diamonds to steel!
body:
**Retextures everything diamond in the game to steel. This includes item names and advancements. Now updated to 1.21.11!**

![Converts everything diamond to steel!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b0bd6b5eeebd7984ac076136e0c9710a92e125.png)
**Uses the same color palette as the mace so they go well together.**

Great for pvp or if you're tired of seeing blue.
